name: High-Stakes Assessment Security Hardening
description: You are the technical administrator for the State Board of Accountancy, which administers the Uniform CPA Examination. Following a security breach involving unauthorized database access, you must harden the SEB Server configuration at http://localhost:8080 (login: super-admin / admin). Configure a new exam named 'CPA Board Exam - Maximum Security', a secure connection named 'CPA Exam Connection' with the configuration password 'CPASecure2024', and an exam template named 'CPA Board Exam Template'. The template must include a 'Last Ping Time' indicator named 'Connection Monitor' (warning threshold 5000, danger threshold 12000) and an 'Error-Log Counter' indicator named 'Security Alert Monitor' (warning threshold 3, danger threshold
